prerequisites.value: Cleave, Improved Unarmed Strike, base attack bonus +6 or monk level 6th.

description.value: **Benefit:** As a standard action, you can make a single unarmed strike at your full base attack bonus against a foe within reach. If you hit, you deal damage normally and can make an additional attack (using your full base attack bonus ) against up to two other foes that are also within reach. You take a â2 penalty to your Armor Class until the start of your next turn for each additional attack you make with this feat.
